question: Which nations have both customers with card credit above 50 and customers with card credit below 75.
sql: SELECT Nationality FROM customer GROUP BY Nationality HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN Card_Credit > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN Card_Credit < 75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0;

back_translation.intent: 查询两个条件下的国籍交集

semantic.reason: filters条件错误地将两个信用卡额度条件应用于同一客户行，而原始问题要求同一国家中存在两个不同客户分别满足Card_Credit >50和Card_Credit <75的条件。需要使用子查询或GROUP BY+HAVING结构实现交叉条件，当前描述缺少必要的分组和聚合逻辑。
